transcription.text: An accommodating leather trimmed interior. Three spacious rows of seating. It's very refined. Introducing the 240 horsepower Pilot, built by Honda. It's a four-speed transmission. You can adjust the interior height. It has a large rear seat. The top of the rear seat has a large rear seat. It is very comfortable for passengers. It has a very well-equipped interior. The rear seat is so comfortable!
